title: There
html: [Intro] C#m B A F#m C#m/G# B9 C#m B A F#m C#m/G# B9 C#m7 B/D# E Well, i've heard a million times E/G# A9 In many songs and rhymes C#m E/G# B9 B I've witnessed arguments about how it will be A/C# B/D# E Will it be every living eye E/G# A9 To see him coming in the sky C#m B9 A And what about the midnight cry, i hear them say C#m7 B/D# E Are the streets like I was told E/G# A9 Are they really made of gold C#m E/G# B9 B And will Jerusalem be built where it is now F#m7 C#m How can there be a crystal sea B9 A If the sea has ceased to be Bsus4 B A Esus4 E All these questions annoy me, i just don't care E/G# A B9 Cause i want to be there E I just want to be there E/G# A B C#m And sit at my je-sus' feet E/G# B9 B I wanna be there A B E I just don't care about the crown F#m E/G# A Or the color of the gown Bsus4 B A E (B/D#) As long as jesus is in town i wanna be there [C#m B A F#m C#m/G# B9] A9 B7/A A9 A B C#m B I know there are things in this life that we can't understand Bsus4 B D E/G# A9 There are moments we tend to forget where we belong B7/A A9 E B/D# C#m B Sure, there's time… yes, there's wealth in that beautiful place Bsus4 C#m B A7+ Bsus4 B C#m But all i want is to see him face to face E/G# A9 A B I just want to be there Esus4 E I just want to be there E/G# A B C#m And sit at my je-sus' feet E/G# Bsus4 B I wanna be there A B E I just don't care about the crown F#m E/G# A9 Or the color of the gown Bsus4 B A As long as jesus is in town C#m B A F#m C#m/G# B9 i wanna be there [A E/G# Bsus4 B] [E/G# A B] [C#m B A]
